short_description: MacBook Air unable to connect to hospital Wi-Fi on 3rd floor
description: Rebecca's MacBook Air M2 cannot authenticate to the BCMC-Staff wireless network from the 3rd floor chaplain office. iPhone hotspot workaround in use. Affects access to pastoral care scheduling portal.

short_description: Pastoral care shared calendar not syncing in Outlook
description: The department shared calendar for Pastoral Care stops syncing after 10-15 minutes of inactivity. On-call schedule updates from Dr. Vickers do not appear without a manual refresh. Issue started after the May mail migration.

short_description: Badge access reader outside Oncology wing not scanning
description: The badge reader at the Oncology wing entry (Room 300 corridor) is not responding to scans. Rebecca and other chaplains are unable to access the wing without escort. Physical facilities have been notified as well.

short_description: Hospital VPN disconnects every 30 minutes on MacBook
description: When working from home on Fridays or overnight on-call, the BCMC Pulse Secure VPN client disconnects after approximately 30 minutes of inactivity. Reconnection requires full re-authentication. Affects access to pastoral scheduling and secure documentation portal.

short_description: Printer in Pastoral Care office not responding
description: The shared printer in the Pastoral Care suite (Room 214) is offline. Chaplaincy team unable to print visit schedules and department memos. Printer shows Ready light but does not process jobs.

short_description: Hospital staff portal login loop after password reset
description: After resetting BCMC Active Directory password, the staff intranet portal enters a redirect loop and cannot authenticate. Cleared browser cache, issue persists. Staff ID: rprice. Affects ability to view department announcements and submit timesheets.

short_description: Suspicious email phishing attempt on BCMC staff account
description: Rebecca received a suspicious email purportedly from BCMC HR requesting credential verification via an external link. Email header shows external origin. Forwarded to IT Security per BCMC policy. Account credentials not entered. Requesting review and confirmation of account integrity.

short_description: iPad Air not receiving BCMC secure email push notifications
description: Rebecca's iPad Air enrolled in BCMC MDM is not receiving push notifications for the BCMC secure email app. Notifications work on iPhone 15 Pro. iPad email loads correctly on manual refresh only. Issue began after the May iOS update.

short_description: Conference room AV system in Chapel unresponsive
description: The projector and audio system in the hospital chapel/meditation room will not power on. Staff chaplains use this space for memorial services, CPE resident training sessions, and multi-faith gatherings. Control panel shows no response. Last worked 2026-01-05.

short_description: On-call pager/phone integration not forwarding to cell after hours
description: The on-call overnight chaplaincy phone is not forwarding calls to Rebecca's iPhone 15 Pro during rotating overnight on-call shifts. Calls go to voicemail instead of forwarding. This is a patient care continuity risk for chaplaincy coverage. Reporting per hospital protocol.

short_description: Zoom meeting link for CPE supervisory session not working
description: The BCMC-issued Zoom link for weekly CPE (Clinical Pastoral Education) resident supervisory meeting returns error: Meeting does not exist. Affects Rebecca's ability to run the Wednesday 2 PM supervisory session with 2 CPE residents remotely.

short_description: BCMC email account showing incorrect display name
description: Rebecca's hospital email displays as Rebeca Price (single c) in the global address list. Incorrect name appears in meeting invites and sent mail. Requesting correction to Rebecca Price in Active Directory.

short_description: Shared Pastoral Care network drive inaccessible from MacBook
description: The mapped drive for the Pastoral Care department shared folder (\\bcmc-files\pastoral) is not accessible from Rebecca's MacBook Air. Error: Connection refused. Drive is accessible from the department desktop PC. Affects access to CPE training materials and department policy documents.

short_description: Multi-factor authentication prompt looping on hospital SSO
description: When logging into the BCMC single sign-on portal, the MFA prompt repeats indefinitely after entering the correct code from the Microsoft Authenticator app. Cleared app data, re-enrolled device, issue persists. Blocking access to scheduling and HR systems.

Unable to submit bi-weekly timesheet via the BCMC HR portal. Portal returns 403 Forbidden when clicking Submit. Deadline is end of pay period Friday. Reported to both HR and IT. Using paper backup as fallback.
